title: SurfaceSiteOverlay
description: Editorial overlay per surface site per locale. Used by both /moon and /mars (PRD-009 / RFC-012). For orbiters, `site_name` is the orbital regime (e.g. 'Sun-synchronous polar orbit' or '~265 × 12,000 km elliptical').

site_name.description: Surface: location name (e.g. 'Jezero Crater'). Orbiter: orbit description.

left.description: Surface only: hardware that remains. Optional for orbiters.

fact.description: Editorial paragraph — what makes this mission significant

capability.description: One-line statement connecting this mission to broader capabilities (per PRD-006/PRD-009 capability ladder)
